name_en: Style: CH190 Coach HANNA Series Full of high-end feel and artisan details! Especially the side oil-edge pleated design makes the silhouette gentle and three-dimensional! Capacity needs no explanation, continuing the traditional bucket bag's large functional capacity, dual detachable shoulder straps, practical and versatile, Canvas material, Full of temperament, Magnetic snap closure, convenient and safe, Especially suitable for elegant ladies
